2379660.name: MoonLess Original Soundtrack
2379660.description: The original soundtrack for space platformer MoonLess features a collection of catchy tunes that are heavily inspired by the golden era of action-driven upbeat video game music of the 1980s. From dark and mysterious soundscapes to anthemic synthpop melodies, each track pays homage to the sound and style of iconic acts such as Yellow Magic Orchestra, Propaganda, Jean-Michel Jarre and New Order. Embark on this sonic journey and be ready to hum along!
